headline: Why RBLX Stock’s Selloff Creates A Rare Entry Point
summary: Roblox (NYSE: RBLX) is weathering a massive sentiment shift. On Friday, the stock plunged 18% after management slashed its full-year bookings guidance by nearly $1 billion. The culprit is friction from newly implemented child safety measures. These strict age verification protocols and communication restrictions have materially slowed new user acquisition. Shares are currently trading around $45, hovering near an 18 month low.

headline: Electronic Arts and Visa Team Up to Launch a Global, Multi-Year Partnership With EA SPORTS
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., May 04, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA), a global leader in interactive entertainment, today announced a landmark, multi-year collaboration with Visa (NYSE: V), the world’s leader in digital payments, to deliver the next generation of immersive, player-first experiences across EA SPORTS™ franchises.
